intent.symptom_summary: RequestBar drifts from design/reference.html on 5 presentational props an earlier fidelity pass (spec 010) did not enumerate: method-trigger font/colour/treatment, method dropdown OPEN PANEL styling, URL input (missing leading link icon + wrong font + wrong placeholder string), Save hover state, Share rendered with text label instead of icon-only.
intent.desired_summary: Every listed element matches design/reference.html to pixel parity using the exact resolved values pre-extracted in design/styles.css + design-fidelity-contract.md (var(--token)=resolves-to-token; color-mix(...) at token level), bound to semantic class names from design/tokens.json (no export cruft: data-om-*, __OmT, inline styles, tweaks-panel). Dispositions: MATCH 'Request bar' + 'Method colours (per verb)' for the listed elements; Share MATCHES .btn-ghost but icon-only + stays disabled; 'Send split-dropdown' section DEVIATE/OUT. URL placeholder equals exactly 'Enter URL or paste cURL command…' (literal, no cURL behaviour).
intent.verbatim_prompt: The RequestBar of an HTTP client visually drifts from the design reference on several presentational props an earlier fidelity pass did not enumerate: (1) the method-select trigger's font-family, text colour and surrounding treatment; (2) the method dropdown's OPEN PANEL (menu) styling; (3) the URL input — a missing leading link icon, a wrong font, and a placeholder that must match the reference string exactly ("Enter URL or paste cURL command…", a literal placeholder only — NO cURL behaviour implied); (4) the Save button's hover state; (5) the Share button carries a visible text label but the reference shows it icon-only. Fix these as exact computed-style targets, zero behaviour change. Visual fidelity is MANDATORY: design/reference.html is the VISUAL TARGET to match to pixel parity, and the exact resolved values are pre-extracted in design/styles.css and design/design-fidelity-contract.md — use those exact computed-style values, treating var(--token) as resolves-to-token (not a literal hex) and color-mix(...) at token level. Copy the VALUES, never the CODE: the export carries generated cruft (data-om-* attributes, __OmT wrappers, inline styles, a tweaks-panel) that must NOT enter the build — rebuild with semantic class names bound to design/tokens.json. Apply ONLY this disposition (the contract is the full reference menu; the app diverges from parts of it): MATCH the "Request bar" and "Method colours (per verb)" sections for the elements above; Share values MATCH .btn-ghost BUT assert it icon-only (no text label) and keep Share disabled (no behaviour assertion); DEVIATE/OUT on the "Send split-dropdown" section — the app ships a simple Send with no split (that surface is the send-options feature, not this bug). Scope: RequestBar.css + presentational RequestBar.tsx (URL link icon, exact placeholder, drop Share label) + the Dropdown molecule's menu panel; tab-title behaviour, Send-options, and Share enable/behaviour are out; tests stay green.

constraints.content: Only Shell writes documentElement data-mstyle (§4 Never / 009 AC-6)
Never use inline styles — class-based styling via cx() (§4 Never)
Prefer design tokens over literal values (§4 Prefer)

risks.risk: Behaviour paths untouched. Main risk is the shared Dropdown molecule ripple (PrimitivesDemo + visual snapshots) and CT fidelity needing the data-mstyle=soft context (005 fixture-scoping).

plan_seeds.recommended_approach_summary: Fits the stated scope and the project reuse-first rule: it consumes the existing atom at src/renderer/src/components/atoms/icons.ts:72 rather than building a new one, and leaves the document-level marker attribute under its sole owner (Shell) untouched. Honours unchanged_behavior — the send path, the canSend guard, dirty/markClean and the disabled action stub are not modified, so unit and CT suites stay green. Per-element computed-style targets and the precise scope live in the Codebase Findings table and the Open Uncertainties; full-parity confirmation is deferred to the verify step.

alternatives_considered.summary: Apply only the RequestBar.css/.tsx fixes (URL .url-bar + link icon + placeholder, Share icon-only, method-trigger tidy, Save hover) and leave the Dropdown molecule untouched, deferring the method-menu panel alignment to a separate design-system change.

discriminator.primary_confirms_if: If all computed styles equal design/styles.css targets -> PRIMARY (A) confirmed, static-CSS fix sufficient. If method-trigger/Save-hover already match but URL/Share/Dropdown differ -> A confirmed for those and C's residual is null. If any target value maps to a missing token -> RUNNER-UP (B) confirmed.
